name: get_order_details
description: Retrieve order/profile details from the backend database using the order ID. The user must provide their order ID which starts with 'OUM' followed by 8 digits (e.g. OUM12345678). Do NOT accept names — only the order ID is allowed for looking up orders.

query_params_schema.description:
The order ID that was given to the user when the profile was saved.
It always starts with 'OUM' followed by 8 digits (e.g. OUM12345678).
This field is required.
Do not accept a child's name — only the order ID is valid.
